logical.object_continuity: All objects remain visible and track consistently without sudden jumps or disappearances.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry and building structures remain stable and coherent throughout the sequence.

decision.risk_context: No immediate high-risk interaction is visible. The pedestrian crossing is observed but does not appear to require emergency braking.
